issue.title: Design: dark navy high-contrast section layout — fix washed-out light-on-white
issue.description: Use the dark navy from our share cards as background in key homepage sections. The current light-on-white reads washed out and lacks contrast. Color scheme (purple + amber) is fine but needs more contrast. Spec which sections go dark, exact navy hex, text colors on dark bg.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
